CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Plaintiffs Unverified First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS MANUEL BOJORQUEZ, M.D AND MEDICAL DISTRIBUTION LLC'S Motion To Strike Portion Of Plaintiff's Unverified First Amended Complaint, Defendants' motion to strike two sentences form paragraph 13 of the first amended complaint is denied. Defendants have not shown that the two sentences are irrelevant to this case. In fact, they give context to the remainder of paragraph 13, which defendants do not seek to have stricken. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
